{{Quote|You know anyplace to get good tarsh maxers? I'm hungry.|Anakin Skywalker, to Lorana Jinzler|<ref name="Outbound Flight" />}}
'''Tarsh maxers''' were a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] enjoyed by [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. They could be prepared by roasting, which made the food give off a distinctive aroma.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Tarsh maxers were the headliners on the menu of the [[Restaurant/Legends|cantina]] [[Panky's]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]]. Skywalker and his [[Teacher/Legends|master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] [[Diet/Legends|ate]] tarsh maxers alongside Padawan [[Lorana Jinzler]] at Panky's<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="OF Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tarsh maxers appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
